name: chain_gov_contract_va_general_mental_health_
method: [GOV CONTRACT] VA GENERAL MENTAL HEALTH AND SUICIDE PREVENTION AWARENESS AND EDUCATION OUTREACH SERVICES (deadline: 2027-03-03)

stages.task: Query SAM.gov API (free, api.sam.gov) for NAICS 624190/621330/923120 + keyword mental health + agency=VA. Filter: posted within 30 days, deadline >60 days out, value >$500K. Extract: title, value, deadline, setaside, POC email.

Score each contract: SDVOSB setaside (+3), value >$1M (+2), performance period >1yr (+2), mental health outreach (matches our content niche, +1). Keep score >=5. Flag teaming-friendly language in PWS.

For each qualified contract, query LinkedIn/USASpending.gov for incumbent contractors in this NAICS with past VA performance. Build cold outreach: offer contract intelligence + teaming letter writing at 5-10% of contract value on win. Send via cold email scripts.
